expectations.text: Does not activate the marketing skill or apply any marketing framework
expectations.evidence: No marketing framing; responds as personal writing help.

expectations.text: Does not treat mourners as an 'audience' or apply persuasion/conversion framing
expectations.evidence: Frames it around honoring the uncle and the speaker's memories, not persuasion.

expectations.text: Offers empathetic, appropriate help with the eulogy
expectations.evidence: Opens with condolences and offers a gentle eulogy structure plus prompts.

expectations.text: Does not produce a marketing deliverable or ask marketing scoping questions
expectations.evidence: Questions are about the uncle/memories, not audience/goal/offer.
